title: Sour Sweet Tahini Stovetop
description: A light and savory dish perfect for hangover cures, featuring the rich and nutty flavor of tahini combined with a tangy sauce to balance its sweetness.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons Tahini
ingredients.notes: Choose a smooth variety for this recipe

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup Fresh lemon juice
ingredients.notes: Fresh is best, or use bottled from a trusted brand

ingredients.name: 3 tablespoons Soy sauce (optional for extra umami)

instructions: In a small bowl, mix together tahini and lemon juice. Stir in minced garlic and finely chopped onion.
If desired, add a few drops of olive oil for extra richness and whisk in soy sauce if using to enhance umami flavors.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Once hot, pour the mixture into the skillet and stir continuously until slightly thickened and fragrant, about 2 minutes.
Remove from heat immediately after thickening to prevent burning, as it will thicken further upon standing.
